formHero.description: Set the package name, price, credit limits, and benefits that students will see in the app.

identity.title: Package identity

limits.title: Credit limits

features.title: Package benefits

visibility.title: Visibility

form.name: Display name
form.featuresPlaceholder:
Access to recorded lessons

Priority support from the team
form.featuresHint: Write one clear benefit per line. Example: Access to recorded lessons.
form.recommendedDescription: Highlight this plan as the best choice.
form.activeDescription: Allow this plan to appear as available.
form.priceHint: This is a one-time package price. The credits stay available until students use them.

hero.title: Master Chinese Language with Live Classes
hero.subtitle: Join our comprehensive online Chinese learning platform designed for Arabic speakers. Learn in live cohorts, book private sessions, complete structured homework, and track your progress with expert teachers.

features.subtitle: We provide a comprehensive learning experience tailored for Arabic speakers to build strong Chinese language skills.

liveClasses.title: Live cohort sessions
liveClasses.description: Join scheduled live cohort classes with real-time teaching, Q&A, and classmates progressing together.

groupAndOneToOne.title: Live cohorts & private sessions
groupAndOneToOne.description: Enroll in structured cohorts for consistent pace, or add private sessions when you need focused 1:1 time.

homeworkAndPractice.title: Homework & practice
homeworkAndPractice.description: Reinforce each lesson with structured assignments, instructor feedback, and measurable milestones.

recordedSessions.title: Recorded sessions
recordedSessions.description: Revisit cohort recordings anytime to review lessons and stay on track between live classes.

howItWorks.title: How It Works?
howItWorks.subtitle: Start your Chinese learning journey in 4 simple steps

step1.title: Create Your Account
step1.description: Sign up in seconds and tell us about your learning goals

step2.title: Choose Your Path
step2.description: Pick a live cohort course or add private sessions—whichever fits your goals and schedule.

step3.title: Start Learning
step3.description: Join live classes, complete homework, and track your progress

step4.title: Master Chinese
step4.description: Practice consistently and achieve fluency with our structured curriculum

learningStyle.subtitle: Select the option that best fits your schedule and learning preferences

cohorts.title: Live cohorts
cohorts.description: Learn in a fixed cohort with scheduled live classes, classmates, and a clear syllabus from week one.

privateSessions.title: Private sessions
privateSessions.description: Book private time with instructors for speaking practice, exam prep, or topics you want to go deeper on.

feedback.subtitle: Real reviews from learners enrolled in Nihao courses appear here when published.

empty.title: Reviews will appear here
empty.description: We only show verified reviews from enrolled students. Explore courses to get started—your feedback can help the next learner.

discover.title: Find your next course
discover.subtitle: Browse live cohorts, instructors, and syllabi in one place.

rating.fromPublished: Average from {{count}} published review(s) on Nihao.

publicFaq.title: Frequently asked questions
publicFaq.subtitle: Answers from your site CMS (FAQ section).

publicFaq.empty: No FAQ entries are published yet.

publicAbout.title: About Nihao
publicAbout.subtitle: Mission, vision, and story from your CMS.
publicAbout.loadError: We could not load this page right now.
publicAbout.empty: About content is not configured yet.
publicAbout.fallbackStory: Nihao Academy connects Arabic-speaking learners with structured Chinese programs, live cohorts, and private sessions.
publicAbout.policiesBody: For billing, refunds, and legal terms, contact our team. Administrators manage full policy text in the CMS.

publicBlogs.title: Programs & highlights
publicBlogs.subtitle: Articles and tips from our team. For the full course catalog, visit Explore.
publicBlogs.notFound: This article is unavailable or was removed.
publicBlogs.emptyBody: This article does not have any body text yet.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Chinese Learning Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join Nihao today and experience interactive classes, expert teachers, and a structured path to fluency.

brand.description: Nihao Academy helps Arabic speakers master Chinese through live classes, practical exercises, and expert guidance.

footer.socialComingSoon: Social links coming soon — set VITE_SOCIAL_*_URL in your environment to enable.

login.brandSubtitle: Continue your Chinese learning journey with Nihao Academy.
login.title: Login to Your Account
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Continue your learning journey.

signup.brandSubtitle: Master Chinese with expert teachers and a proven curriculum designed for Arabic speakers.
signup.benefit1: Live interactive classes with expert teachers
signup.title: Create Your Account
signup.subtitle: Join thousands of students mastering Chinese.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send reset instructions if an account exists.
forgotPassword.successBody: If an account exists for that address, we have sent password reset instructions. Please check your inbox.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.loginFailed: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

explore.subtitle: Browse our full catalogue of Chinese language courses — from absolute beginner to advanced HSK levels.
explore.showingPaged: Showing {{count}} on this page · {{total}} total · page {{page}}

hsk1.title: HSK 1 Foundations
hsk1.desc: Master the first 150 words and basic sentence patterns for everyday communication.

hsk2.title: HSK 2 Intermediate
hsk2.desc: Build on HSK 1 with 300 words, grammar patterns, and conversational skills.

hsk3.title: HSK 3 Advanced
hsk3.desc: Reach the HSK 3 standard with 600 words, complex sentences, and listening practice.

conversation.title: Conversational Chinese
conversation.desc: Speak with confidence in real-life scenarios — shopping, travel, and daily life.

writing.title: Chinese Character Writing
writing.desc: Learn stroke order, radicals, and character recognition for reading and writing.

beginner.title: Absolute Beginner Chinese
beginner.desc: Zero experience? Start here. Tones, pinyin, and your first 50 characters.

hsk1o2o.title: HSK 1 — One-to-One
hsk1o2o.desc: Personalised HSK 1 preparation with a dedicated teacher at your own pace.

hsk2o2o.title: HSK 2 — One-to-One
hsk2o2o.desc: Accelerate your HSK 2 progress with tailored one-to-one lessons.

checkout.title: Confirm enrollment
checkout.subtitle: Review your cohort. If you have an active plan with quota, you can join immediately. Otherwise you can pay for this cohort directly.

cohort.directIntro: Your plan does not cover this enrollment or you have used your quota. Pay the cohort price below and submit proof of transfer. Staff will confirm your payment and activate your access.
cohort.directSubmitError: Could not submit your cohort payment. Try again.
cohort.successBody: Your cohort purchase is pending. Please transfer the funds using your chosen method and wait for admin approval. You will get access as soon as your payment is confirmed.
cohort.successPendingNote: If you already had a pending request for this cohort, we kept your existing order.
cohort.successToast: Payment request submitted. We will confirm your cohort access after review.

coupon.label: Coupon code
coupon.contextRequired: Coupon validation needs course or plan context.
coupon.applied: Coupon is valid for this purchase.
coupon.invalid: This coupon could not be applied.

package.title: Subscribe to plan
package.subtitle: Submit payment details. Your subscription stays pending until staff confirms your payment.
package.receiptHint: Paste a link to your receipt or transfer confirmation (must be a valid https URL).
package.receiptRequired: Please enter a receipt or proof URL.
package.submitError: Could not submit checkout. Try again.
package.successToast: Payment request submitted. We will confirm your subscription soon.
package.notFoundBody: This plan is no longer available. Return to plans and pick another.

invalid.title: Invalid checkout link
invalid.body: This link is incomplete. Open a course and choose a cohort, or pick a plan from Subscriptions.

checkout.courseLoadError: We could not load this course. Check the link or try again from Explore.
checkout.noCourseContext: Course details were not included in this link. You can still enroll if this cohort is correct—otherwise return to the course page from Explore.
checkout.cohortMismatch: This cohort is not listed for this course. Go back and pick a cohort from the course page.
checkout.genericError: Enrollment could not be completed. Please try again.
checkout.alreadyEnrolled: You are already enrolled in this cohort.

quota.title: Upgrade your plan
quota.body: Your current subscription does not allow this enrollment, or you have reached your package limit. Choose a plan that fits your goals.

subscription.subtitle: Select the plan that fits your learning goals. Upgrade or cancel anytime.

features.feature1: Up to 5 group class seats per month

examDetails.notAvailable: This exam cannot be started right now (status: {{status}}).

ins.timer: Complete the exam within the allotted time; it submits automatically when time expires.
ins.graded: Your attempt is graded on the server when you submit.

examDetails.alreadySubmitted: You have already submitted this exam.

ready.title: Ready to Start?
ready.description: Make sure you have {{duration}} minutes available and a stable internet connection.

validation.file: Please choose a file or paste a file URL.

homeworkDetail.fileOrUrlHint: Small files are embedded as a data URL. For larger files, upload elsewhere and paste the URL.

requirements.title: Requirements
requirements.fallbackDefault: Follow your instructor’s directions and submit before the deadline.

fallback.TEXT: Submit a written response as described in the instructions.
fallback.FILE: Upload the requested files (audio, PDF, or images) within the size limit.
fallback.LINK: Submit a working link to your completed work.

upload.cta: Click to upload or drag and drop
upload.hint: Audio files, PDFs, or images (Max 10MB each)

sidebar.tip1: Double-check spelling and characters before you submit.
sidebar.tip2: Keep audio recordings clear and easy to hear.
sidebar.tip3: Use the file types and size limits shown above.
sidebar.tip4: Submit before the due date to avoid a late status.

homeworkDetail.successMsg: Your submission has been received. Your teacher will review it soon.

warn.title: Submit Exam?

validation.incomplete: Please answer every question before submitting.

settings.subtitleLive: Update how you appear to students and keep your password secure.
settings.sectionProfileHint: Name and bio show on your public instructor presence.
settings.sectionSecurityHint: You will be signed out everywhere after a successful password change.
